layout.name: fireLifetime
layout.title: Fire Lifetime
layout.tooltip: How long the flame is alive before extinguishing, in seconds. 0 means forever.

layout.name: downtime
layout.title: Downtime
layout.tooltip: The amount of seconds between cycles.

layout.name: cycleCount
layout.title: Cycle Count
layout.tooltip: The amount of cycles of burners with different cycle indices taking turns.

layout.name: cycleIndex
layout.title: Cycle Index
layout.tooltip: The cycle this burner is on.

layout.name: fireScale
layout.title: Fire Scale
layout.tooltip: Stretches/squashes the fire by this multiplier.

layout.name: isGlobal
layout.title: Is Global?
layout.tooltip: Is the burner globally connected? (will not despawn, but makes it sync with other global burners)
